allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'C:\\Users\\PC\\.claude\\projects\\C--arc-swap-v9\\88f6e1a3-6b96-48b4-8a94-09e5d1f825fa\\tool-results\\teller.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); abi=d.get\('abi',[]\); [print\(x.get\('type'\), x.get\('name'\), '\(', ','.join\(i.get\('type',''\)+' '+i.get\('name',''\) for i in x.get\('inputs',[]\)\), '\)', '->', ','.join\(o.get\('type',''\) for o in x.get\('outputs',[]\)\), x.get\('stateMutability',''\)\) for x in abi if x.get\('type'\) in \('function','event'\)]")
